title: HELE Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Helen of Troy Limited Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
author: The Schall Law Firm
description: The Schall Law Firm is seeking investors who purchased Helen of Troy Limited securities between April 24, 2024 and October 8, 2025 to join a class action lawsuit. The company allegedly made false and misleading statements about its Project Pegasus restructuring program, overstating its success and cost savings while downplaying implementation issues. Investors who suffered losses are encouraged to contact the firm before August 3, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is facing a securities fraud lawsuit for making false and misleading statements about its Project Pegasus restructuring program. Allegations include overstating the success of cost-saving initiatives while concealing implementation problems, which caused investor losses.

title: ROSEN, TRUSTED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Helen of Troy Limited Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – HELE
author: Rosen Law Firm
description: Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against Helen of Troy Limited on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between April 24, 2024 and October 8, 2025. The lawsuit alleges misrepresentations regarding Project Pegasus, a restructuring program, where the company assured investors of progress despite acknowledged implementation issues with its Tennessee distribution center. The lead plaintiff deadline is August 3, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is the subject of a securities class action lawsuit alleging misrepresentations about Project Pegasus performance. Despite acknowledging implementation issues, management allegedly misled investors about the program's progress and cost savings, resulting in investor damages when the true details emerged.

title: HELE Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Helen of Troy Limited Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
author: The Schall Law Firm
description: The Schall Law Firm is seeking investors who purchased Helen of Troy Limited (HELE) securities between April 24, 2024 and October 8, 2025 to join a class action lawsuit alleging securities fraud. The company allegedly made false and misleading statements about its Project Pegasus restructuring program, overstating its success and cost-saving benefits while downplaying implementation issues.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is accused of making false and misleading statements about its Project Pegasus restructuring program, misrepresenting cost savings and progress while concealing implementation problems. This alleged fraud resulted in investor losses and triggered a securities class action lawsuit.

title: MANH Investor News: Rosen Law Firm Announces Investigation of Breaches of Fiduciary Duties by the Directors and Officers of Manhattan Associates, Inc. – MANH
author: Rosen Law Firm
description: Rosen Law Firm is investigating potential breaches of fiduciary duties by directors and officers of Manhattan Associates, Inc. The firm is seeking shareholders who own MANH stock to join the investigation. Similar investigations are also being conducted for Helen of Troy Limited and TruBridge, Inc.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is under investigation for potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its directors and officers, which indicates governance concerns and potential shareholder harm.
A class action lawsuit has been announced on behalf of purchasers of the company's common stock, indicating alleged securities violations.
The firm is investigating potential securities claims on behalf of shareholders, suggesting alleged violations that may have caused investor losses.

title: HELEN OF TROY CLASS ACTION ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Announces that a Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Helen of Troy Limited and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
author: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C.
description: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Helen of Troy Limited for allegedly misleading investors about Project Pegasus, a restructuring initiative. The company claimed the project was delivering efficiencies and cost savings, but in reality lacked sufficient resources and budget. When the truth emerged in July 2024, the company reported a 49% EPS decline and cut full-year revenue guidance by over 20%, causing stock to drop 27.7%. Investors who purchased shares between April 24, 2024, and October 8, 2025, can join the lawsuit.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is accused of making false and misleading statements about Project Pegasus cost-saving initiatives while lacking adequate resources to achieve stated goals. Subsequent financial disclosures revealed a 49% EPS decline and 20%+ revenue guidance cut, resulting in a 27.7% stock price drop and triggering a class action lawsuit.
